hypothesis: The anti_repetition gain decomposes into three separable components: (1) elevated temperature, (2) repeat_penalty discouraging exact token repetition, (3) frequency+presence penalties penalising distributional frequency. If penalties_only matches anti_repetition, the mechanism is distributional diversity pressure, not temperature. If repeat_only matches it, the mechanism is explicit token exclusion. Understanding the driver constrains the design space for optimized profiles.

experiments.name: ablation
experiments.purpose: Isolate which component of anti_repetition drives the creativity gain

experiments.name: combined_internal_external
experiments.purpose: Test if anti_repetition compounds with restlessness_best (external method). Is the effect additive?
experiments.note: 2 profiles × 2 methods × 2 models × 2 tasks × 2 seeds = 32 cells. Requires token-budget matched comparison.

acceptance.claim_language: identifies mechanism driving anti_repetition creativity gain
